# netbox_asn (Data Source)

Fetches an Autonomous System Number (ASN) from NetBox.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `asn` (Number) The ASN value to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the ASN.
- `id` (Number) The ID of the ASN.
- `rir` (Number) The RIR ID associated with this ASN.
- `tenant` (Number) The tenant ID associated with this ASN.
